CITY OF LONGMONT EVENTS PAGE / EVENTS

Longmont Public Library hosting Teen Temporary Tattoo Studio
Brief
Ready to draft
Medium priority

The Longmont Public Library is offering a Teen Temporary Tattoo Studio on Wednesday, July 1 from 5-6 pm, providing teens with an opportunity to get temporary tattoos.

Why now: A new event has been added to the library's schedule.

Novelty: 4/5

Before publishing: Confirmation of the specific materials provided, any registration requirements, and target age group.

Why this was flagged

This event provides information about activities for local youth and their families. Suggested treatment: brief. Newsworthiness: 10/20 (immediacy 3, impact 2, conflict 1, novelty 4). Why now: A new event has been added to the library's schedule.

Suggested next step

Verify the location, time, and any specific requirements or materials needed for participants. What would make this publishable: Confirmation of the specific materials provided, any registration requirements, and target age group.

Open source and review
Aggregated across sources

ST. VRAIN VALLEY SCHOOLS WEBSITE / PUBLIC NOTICE

Board of Education Regular Meeting
Watch
Watch
Medium priority

The St. Vrain Valley School District Board of Education will hold a regular meeting on August 12 at 6:00 p.m., providing an opportunity for public input.

Why now: A regular school board meeting is scheduled, providing an opportunity for public engagement.

Novelty: 2/5

Before publishing: The exact location and agenda of the upcoming Board of Education meeting.

Why this was flagged

Public education matters to the community, and this meeting offers insight into district governance. Suggested treatment: watch. Newsworthiness: 10/20 (immediacy 3, impact 4, conflict 1, novelty 2). Why now: A regular school board meeting is scheduled, providing an opportunity for public engagement.

Suggested next step

Confirm the exact location of the meeting before drafting a story or brief. What would make this publishable: The exact location and agenda of the upcoming Board of Education meeting.

Open source and review
Aggregated across sources

ST. VRAIN VALLEY SCHOOLS / FINANCIAL TRANSPARENCY

St. Vrain Valley Schools Receives $53 Million in Competitive Grants
Background
Background
Medium priority

The St. Vrain Valley School District has received over $53 million in competitive grants since January 2018, indicating significant funding for new educational initiatives.

Why now: New financial information regarding competitive grant awards.

Novelty: 4/5

Before publishing: Details on the specific grants, their sources, and how they are being used to improve educational programs.

Why this was flagged

This financial information highlights substantial grant funding that could impact school resources and programs, making it relevant to local reporting. Suggested treatment: background. Newsworthiness: 10/20 (immediacy 2, impact 3, conflict 1, novelty 4). Why now: New financial information regarding competitive grant awards.

Suggested next step

Research the specific grants received, their purposes, and any recent projects funded by these grants. What would make this publishable: Details on the specific grants, their sources, and how they are being used to improve educational programs.

No original source URL
Aggregated across sources

St. Vrain Valley Schools' Career Elevation & Technology Center Offers High-Demand Courses
Background
Background
Medium priority

The CETC provides high-wage, high-growth pathways that prepare students for future careers in technology and other fields.

Why now: Details on the offerings and benefits of the Career Elevation & Technology Center.

Novelty: 4/5

Before publishing: More specific details about course content, enrollment numbers, and success rates.

Why this was flagged

This highlights a specific educational resource that could be of interest to local students and parents seeking career preparation opportunities. Suggested treatment: background. Newsworthiness: 10/20 (immediacy 2, impact 3, conflict 1, novelty 4). Why now: Details on the offerings and benefits of the Career Elevation & Technology Center.

Suggested next step

Explore the curriculum offered at CETC to determine if it aligns with current labor market demands. What would make this publishable: More specific details about course content, enrollment numbers, and success rates.
